stem: A banking study surveys 100 approved loans and observes 35 positive outcomes out of 100 (35.0%). Estimate the true loan default rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.35. Wilson 95% CI: [0.2636, 0.4475]. Point estimate: 0.3555.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
